message:
fix(sync): resolve pool if_not_else lint + add audit regression tests

- Fix clippy::if_not_else in process_returns() by inverting
  the closed-state check to positive-first form
- Add 7 regression tests for asupersync-10x0x.44 audit:
  return_to_closed_pool_drops_resource,
  discard_to_closed_pool_decrements_active,
  create_slot_reservation_cancel_safety,
  idle_eviction_respects_idle_timeout,
  idle_eviction_respects_max_lifetime,
  multiple_acquire_return_cycles_keep_accounting_consistent,
  warmup_resources_reused_by_acquire
- Audit findings: pool accounting is correct, waker notification
  already properly deferred outside lock scope, cancel-safety
  patterns are sound

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
